return(function(l,N,G,P,s,O,J,h,m,K,B,L,b,g,H,c,q,w,x,d,U,p,a,Y)B,b,c,x,h,d,p,g,Y,m,q,L,U,a,K,w,H=function(l,M)local N=K(M)local G=function(G,P,s,O,J,w,d,U)return p(l,{G;P,s;O;J;w;d,U},M,N)end return end,{},function(p,G,P,s)local
